narrative:
Sycamore I (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,174 registered voters, with 47.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.2 percentage points.
